[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 0000001 1
1 0000000 a
2 1001010 3
3 1111000 4
4 0000000 a
5 1111100 5
6 1100110 4
7 1110101 5

01 10 0011010 3
12 21 0010011 3
23 32 1010000 2
34 43 0100000 1
45 54 1101010 4
56 65 0010111 4
67 76 1010011 4
70 07 1010111 5

02 20 0001001 2
13 31 1000011 3
24 42 1110000 3
35 53 1001010 3 match 2
46 64 1111101 6
57 75 1000100 2
60 06 0000100 1
71 17 1001101 4

36 63 1011101 5
47 74 0101110 4
50 05 0010011 3
61 16 0011110 4
72 27 1011110 5

04 40 1111001 5
15 51 0001001 2
26 62 0001101 3
37 73 0001110 3
